members.name: Blastoise
members.notes: Tu starter y tanque Water/Ice. Ice Beam (TM13) es crítico para Lance. Surf como STAB principal.

members.name: Nidoking
members.notes: Nidoran♂ Route 3. Dig para mid game, Earthquake (TM26) late game. Coverage brutal.

members.name: Jolteon
members.notes: Eevee en Celadon → Thunder Stone. 130 Speed base. Thunderbolt (TM24) PRIORIDAD #1.

members.name: Ninetales
members.notes: Vulpix Route 7 (LeafGreen exclusivo). Fire Stone cuando quieras. Confuse Ray + Will-O-Wisp debilitan.

members.name: Snorlax
members.notes: Route 12/16 con Poké Flute. Tanque bruto (160 HP). Shadow Ball (TM30) para Agatha.

members.name: Exeggutor
members.notes: Safari Zone. Sleep Powder (nv 37) + Leaf Stone. TM29 Psychic gratis en Saffron.
